chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Civil Revision Application No. 23 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1.For hearing of CMA No.600/2021 2.For hearing of main case 20.01.2026 Mr. Shehzad Bashiri, advocate for applicant ---------- Mst. Asmat Riffat/applicant/defendant in Summary Suit No.22/2020, is aggrieved by the Order dated 14.01.2021 passed by IVth Additional District Judge Karachi Central, wherein, applicant/defendant’s Leave to Defend Application was allowed conditionally subject to furnishing bank guarantee equivalent to the amount involved in the suit jointly before the Nazir of the Court within the stipulated time framed therein. Applicant is aggrieved with the directions pertaining to furnishing a “Bank Guarantee”. Provisions of Order XXXVII Rule 3 CPC do not prescribe any specific mode of security to be submitted to the Court so long as such security to be submitted is solvent. Accordingly, Counsel seeks submission of “solvent security” as opposed to “Bank Guarantee” only. In the circumstances, I do not find any error in the order dated 14.01.2021 except that the security to be deposited may be any kind of “solvent security” acceptable in the entire discretion of the IVth Additional District Judge Karachi Central. Accordingly, this revision is allowed to such extent. Lastly, this matter has been pending for the last five years and a stay order was also in operation. Therefore, to expedite the summary proceedings, the applicant/defendant is directed to submit the solvent security within 10 days from the date of passing of this order today, failing which IVth Additional District Judge shall proceed with the summary suit expeditiously in accordance with law after issuing Court Motion Notice to the plaintiff.

Lastly, this matter has been pending for the last five years and a stay order was also in operation. Therefore, to expedite the summary proceedings, the applicant/defendant is directed to submit the solvent security within 10 days from the date of passing of this order today, failing which IVth Additional District Judge shall proceed with the summary suit expeditiously in accordance with law after issuing Court Motion Notice to the plaintiff. Office is directed to send certified copy of this Order to the IVth Additional District Judge Karachi Central, to recommence the summary proceedings in terms of the Order passed today. This revision is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Ashraf
